title: Admin Pickaxe
description: An ultra-powerful developer pickaxe with configurable mining modes that can break any block, including normally unobtainable ones.
body:
> ⚠️ **IMPORTANT NOTICE**  
> **Unobtainables only works** when **Insta-Mine** **AND** **Unobtainables** are enabled at the same time.  
> If one is disabled, the feature will not work. This is intentional.

# 🪓 Developer Pickaxe Mod

**Version:** v1 (Minecraft Java)  
**Category:** Tool / Utility / Developer

---

## Crafting Recipe

![Crafting Recepiet](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d20247226d1b3245d5d85f164602a9f36afd3fa8.png)

---

## How to get it
This pickaxe is **not craftable**.  
It is intended for developers and advanced players and is obtained via **commands**, **Creative mode**, or the mod’s intended access method.

---

## Description
The **Developer Pickaxe** is an ultra-powerful mining tool with **9,999 durability** that can mine **any block in the game**, including bedrock and other normally unobtainable blocks.

While holding the pickaxe, press **`G`** to open a settings menu where you can configure its behavior in real time. All active options are shown directly in the tooltip with clear, color-coded ON/OFF indicators.

---

## Features
- **9,999 durability**
- Mines **all blocks**, including bedrock
- Toggleable options:
  - Fortune III
  - Silk Touch
  - Efficiency (levels 1–5)
- Advanced mining modes:
  - 9×9 Area Mining
  - Vein Mine
  - Insta-Mine
- **Unobtainables mode**
- Live tooltip status display

---

## Who is it for?
- Developers, modders, and map makers  
- Creative builds, testing, and debugging  
- Players who want full control over mining behavior
